title: Ocugen Closes $130 Million Convertible Notes Offering
text: Ocugen Closes $130 Million Convertible Notes Offering. Financing Details: Ocugen closed a private offering of $130.0 million aggregate principal amount of 6.75% Convertible Senior Notes due 2034. Notes priced at 90% of principal, generating approximately $112.6 million in net proceeds. Financial Impact: Proceeds refinanced debt and extend runway to 2028, funding late-stage gene therapy programs. Use of Proceeds: Refinancing existing debt. Extending cash runway for operations. Funding late-stage gene therapy clinical development programs. Leadership Changes: On May 8, 2026, Ocugen Chief Medical Officer Huma Qamar departed. Mohamed Genead named interim Chief Medical Officer. Strategic Direction: Remains focused on advancing modifier gene therapy platform for inherited retinal diseases and expanding geographic reach.
